note: v2.9.2 restructures the Sources table in references/04-connectivity-plugins.md into two distinct zod unions — plugin-sources (inside a marketplace catalog's plugins[].source: github, git-subdir, url, npm, pip, bare string) vs marketplace-sources (how the catalog itself is fetched: github, git, url, npm, file, directory, hostPattern, pathPattern, settings). Adds the previously-missing pip plugin-source (undocumented Python-package mechanism paralleling npm, PyPI-backed with {package, version?, registry?} schema) and the marketplace-only hostPattern/pathPattern/settings allowlist sources. All 11 source literals verified by grep of source:h.literal("...") in the v2.1.116 bundle. Core lessons from markdown.engineering (v2.1.88), verified and updated against live binaries through v2.1.116. Chapter 17 (L85) covers v2.1.112-v2.1.113 changes (Remote Workflow sunset, daemon-mode groundwork). Chapter 18 (L86, added in v2.9.1) covers v2.1.114-v2.1.116 changes: (1) OIDC Federation auth (oidc-federation-2026-04-01 beta, 8 new ANTHROPIC_* env vars, credentials-file profile system at <config_dir>/configs/<profile>.json vs env-quad mode), (2) Claude-Code-specific proxy fallbacks CLAUDE_CODE_HTTP(S)_PROXY with downstream propagation to npm/yarn/docker/Java/gcloud child processes, (3) /model slash command gaining supportsNonInteractive for headless 'claude -p /model sonnet ...' usage, (4) CLAUDE_CODE_SIMPLE_SYSTEM_PROMPT as alias for existing slim-prompt flag, (5) CLAUDE_CODE_RETRY_WATCHDOG gated on Linux + remote entrypoint, and (6) 12 new tengu_* identifiers split into 4 GB feature flags gating dark-launched features (tengu_ccr_post_turn_summary, tengu_doorbell_agave = enforce_web_search_mcp_isolation tool-use isolation latch via Pa_(), tengu_gouda_loop = closed-issue notice, tengu_mcp_concurrent_connect = parallel MCP boot), 5 telemetry events implying new wired-up features (tengu_mcp_resource_templates_fetched for new resources/templates/list MCP capability, tengu_rc_upsell_notification_shown for dark-launched /remote-control, tengu_remote_attach_session for --remote attach capability, tengu_ultraplan_plan_ready for ULTRAPLAN plan-ready surface, tengu_tool_use_isolation_latch_denied), and 3 pure observational telemetry (tengu_cli_flags, tengu_keybinding_fired, tengu_scroll_arrows_detected). v2.9.1 also extended diff-versions.sh to extract tengu_* identifiers so this namespace isn't missed in future diffs. v2.9.0 also rewrote the Skills System lesson (L11) against the v2.1.116 bundle: corrected budget unit (characters, not tokens; formula ctxTokens*4*0.01), corrected over-budget behavior (description truncation then name-only collapse, never eviction), corrected user-invocable semantics, corrected safe-properties auto-allow set, documented skillOverrides as UI-only dead code, documented conditional-skill activation via ignore npm package, documented MCP shell-processing skip, documented listing header/entry format/1536-char cap/20-char collapse threshold/bundled-skill truncation protection. v2.9.1 also adds a progressMessage section to L11 documenting the field as plumbed-but-unrendered in v2.1.116 (c47/formatSkillLoadingMetadata ignores its second argument).
